summary: Canonical remains #80853. The open PR #88962 is related to the same preserveKeys feature/fix path but is not merge-ready or closure-ready because it has failing checks, an unresolved ClawSweeper review, and broad unrelated churn. Closed PR #81303 is historical context only.

actions.reason: #80853 is the best surviving canonical issue for the requested session maintenance preserveKeys config surface; keep it open for maintainer/product review and validation of the implementation path.
#88962 is the active related implementation path for #80853, but it should not be merged or used for fixed-by-candidate closeout in this plan because its validation and review gates are not clean.
#81303 is already closed and has been replaced as historical implementation context by the open #88962 path; no action should be applied to it.
